message:
fix: block speculative CLI flag, stream pipe output, and update dependencies

- cli: return an explicit error when --speculative is passed to the CLI
  transcribe command, since speculative streaming is currently only
  available as a library API and the CLI orchestrator does not yet support
  the two-pass pipeline it requires
- process: refactor pipe reading from buffered-then-send to streaming via
  channels, so that timeout and cancellation paths can retrieve partial
  output immediately instead of waiting for the full buffer; replace
  recv() with recv_timeout(50ms) in timeout/cancel paths to avoid
  indefinite blocking when pipe reader threads outlive the child process
- Cargo.lock: bump ftui workspace crates from 0.2.1 to 0.3.0; add prost
  0.13.5 and bytes 1.11.1 dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
